name: Product Elevation
image_prompt_template: Luxury studio product photography of {name} in {state} condition, single hard directional key light from upper-left at 45-degree angle, no fill light, deep warm near-black background ({bg}) with subtle radial warm gradient slightly lighter at center behind product, shadow side fully crushed to near-black with zero shadow detail, strong specular highlight catching primary {material} surface, faint warm hue-matched shadow pool implied beneath product, product completely isolated from brand context and packaging, fine art luxury editorial photography register — Michelin / luxury watch advertising aesthetic, 8K detail, commercial product photography quality

cover_hook.name: Cover Hook
cover_hook.description: Hero product in cascade or specimen composition — pristine, unboxed, commanding
cover_hook.notes: Three instances of hero product in diagonal cascade upper-right to center. Each instance slightly rotated (5-8°). Nearest instance largest. Text occupies lower-left clear zone.

context_setter.name: Context Setter
context_setter.description: Single product specimen — neutral state, establishing the category
context_setter.notes: Single specimen centered in lower-right zone. Neutral state — product exists in its designed, functional form. No damage, no activation.

problem_setup.name: Problem Setup
problem_setup.description: Degraded or obsolete product — shows the old way failing
problem_setup.notes: Product in degraded/obsolete state. Key light emphasizes wear, damage, or age. High contrast on failure points. State: degraded or obsolete.

problem_escalation.name: Problem Escalation
problem_escalation.description: Fragmented or shattered product — chaos at maximum
problem_escalation.notes: Explosion or fragmentation composition — product components burst outward from center. Each fragment lit individually. State: shattered or fragmented.

turning_point.name: Turning Point
turning_point.description: Product activating — power-on moment, the shift from dormant to live
turning_point.notes: Product in activation moment — LED powering on, screen illuminating, status indicator glowing. Practical light from the product itself as secondary light source. State: activated.

pivot_question.name: Pivot Question
pivot_question.description: Text-only — full-bleed warm dark canvas, no product, maximum type size
pivot_question.notes: Pure dark canvas. Headline in Cormorant Display at maximum size. No product. The absence of product is intentional — the question lives in empty space.

solution_introduction.name: Solution Introduction
solution_introduction.description: Pristine product — gleaming, perfect, the answer to the problem
solution_introduction.notes: Single pristine specimen. Specular highlights pushed to near-white. Product appears lit from within. State: gleaming or pristine.

landscape_overview.name: Landscape Overview
landscape_overview.description: Two product specimens — side-by-side comparison at slightly different depths
landscape_overview.notes: Two instances of different products in the same domain. Positioned at slightly different depths for forced perspective. Text reads across both. State: processing.

technical_foundation.name: Technical Foundation
technical_foundation.description: Infrastructure or component product — macro detail, material emphasis
technical_foundation.notes: Product shown at macro scale — component-level detail. Circuit board traces, chip architecture, connector pins. State: anchored.

how_it_works_setup.name: How It Works (Setup)
how_it_works_setup.description: Two interfacing products — the handshake moment before transaction
how_it_works_setup.notes: Two products approaching each other — NFC reader and smartphone, card and terminal. Products oriented toward each other. State: interfacing.

how_it_works_flow.name: How It Works (Flow)
how_it_works_flow.description: Product in operation — motion blur on moving elements, static on housing
how_it_works_flow.notes: Product captured mid-operation. Motion blur applied to moving/spinning elements. Housing sharp. State: executing or operating.

how_it_works_security.name: How It Works (Security)
how_it_works_security.notes: Security product in its most resolved state. Lock indicator lit. Certification mark visible. State: locked or certified.

company_positioning.name: Company Positioning
company_positioning.description: Three hero products in lower row — the product portfolio, elevation at maximum
company_positioning.notes: Three pristine product specimens in a horizontal lower row. Equal spacing. All in pristine/gleaming state. Logo top-right. This is the brand's portfolio moment.

cta_close.name: CTA Close
cta_close.description: Pure dark canvas — no product. Brand logo, invitation text only.
cta_close.notes: The product is absent — conspicuously. The absence after 7+ slides of objects creates silence. The brand stands alone.
